[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image is a close-up cartoon-style character with purple hair and a blue outfit, framed tightly from the shoulders up.

Main Subject:
A chibi-like illustrated character with short, dark purple hair, large purple eyes, and a small mouth, looking to the side with a slight frown or neutral expression. The character is wearing a blue top with a white collar and has a large hand or arm positioned near the lower right of the image, partially covering the lower torso.

Setting:
The background is a flat, solid teal/blue color with no visible environment or objects, suggesting a graphic or avatar-style image.

Visual Details:
The character’s hair is stylized with thick outlines and highlights, with visible strand shapes around the forehead and cheeks. Lighting is flat and evenly colored, typical of a digital illustration. The composition is centered on the character’s head and upper body, with thick black linework and smooth shading in muted purples, blues, and whites. Large white text reading “CUH” appears at the bottom left, overlapping the character’s body.

Visible Text:
CUH

Practical Summary:
A cartoon character with purple hair and a blue and white outfit is shown in a tight, avatar-like close-up. Bold white text “CUH” overlays the lower left area of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
